metadata.title: Strategyzer Pattern Library for Step 2
metadata.scope: Invent vs Shift pattern selection for BMI agent orchestration
notes: Strategyzer public materials confirm 9 INVENT patterns and 27 flavors.
Strategyzer public summary materials refer to 21 total patterns across invent and shift.

The SHIFT pattern names and the full 27-flavor catalog were not recoverable from public sources in this workspace session and should be added from the book or an internal capture before detailed automation.

patterns.name: Unresolved lock-in pattern label
patterns.verification_note: The public composite image OCR captured the descriptor 'How to lock in customers' but did not recover the pattern label cleanly. Keep this placeholder until confirmed against the book or a higher-fidelity source.

notes: Use this section for the established-business transformation patterns once sourced from The Invincible Company or an internal reference.
Do not infer SHIFT pattern names from Business Model Generation patterns.

step_2_behavior: Use the INVENT pattern list in this file as the default candidate library for new-growth opportunities.
Treat SHIFT as unavailable until the pattern names are explicitly populated.
When a candidate pattern is only partially verified, surface it as a tentative recommendation and ask for consultant confirmation.
